fixture: 068_set_operations

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE left_ids (id INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE right_ids (id INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO left_ids VALUES (1)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO left_ids VALUES (1)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 5:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO left_ids VALUES (2)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 6:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO left_ids VALUES (3)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 7:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO right_ids VALUES (1)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 8:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO right_ids VALUES (1)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 9:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO right_ids VALUES (3)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 10:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO right_ids VALUES (4)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 11:
  sql:
    SELECT id FROM left_ids UNION SELECT id FROM right_ids
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 1
      [1] 2
      [2] 3
      [3] 4

statement 12:
  sql:
    SELECT id FROM left_ids UNION ALL SELECT id FROM right_ids
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 1
      [1] 1
      [2] 2
      [3] 3
      [4] 1
      [5] 1
      [6] 3
      [7] 4

statement 13:
  sql:
    SELECT id FROM left_ids UNION SELECT id FROM right_ids INTERSECT SELECT id FROM left_ids
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 1
      [1] 2
      [2] 3

statement 14:
  sql:
    SELECT id FROM left_ids INTERSECT ALL SELECT id FROM right_ids
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 1
      [1] 1
      [2] 3

statement 15:
  sql:
    SELECT id FROM left_ids EXCEPT SELECT id FROM right_ids
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 2

statement 16:
  sql:
    SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM left_ids EXCEPT SELECT id FROM right_ids) AS q UNION SELECT 4
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 2
      [1] 4
